theme_notes: Touchstones pulled from today: Trump's 10-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire, Mars ash creeping across Utopia Planitia (ESA Mars Express photos), comet A1 MAPS disintegrating during perihelion, FIFA banning tailgating at US World Cup venues, ex-Eagle Alshon Jeffery arrested for insurance fraud, Joe Rogan backing Spencer Pratt for LA mayor, BTS's MetLife Stadium run, ICE acting head Todd Lyons leaving May 31, China weighing radar systems for Iran, and a third far-side solar blast this week.
settled: Perfectly balanced. Like the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire — lasts 10 days, tops.
Zero debt. Moving slower than Mars ash across Utopia Planitia.
Somehow more stable than Comet A1 MAPS, which crashed into the sun.
youOwe: You owe less than Alshon Jeffery's bail. And he committed insurance fraud.
This is coronal-mass-ejection money. Invisible, inevitable, already incoming.
The Mars ash is moving faster than your intent to pay this back.
You owe a Spencer Pratt campaign donation. A REAL one. Not a goof.
That's two FIFA-approved non-tailgates. Bring your own regret.
Enough to fund one BTS light stick. Not even the nice one.
You owe a framed Mars Express Orbiter printout. You're not allowed in that room.
This is 'Joe Rogan won't book you' money.
Your debt has the same vibe as Alshon Jeffery's insurance claim. Bold but dumb.
You could afford a Todd Lyons exit package. Start packing, you.
Moving in faster than that coronal-hole solar wind. Equally unwelcome.
This is 'personal Mars Express shareholder' money. Embarrassing to explain.
You owe a small Iranian radar system. China is taking orders this week.
Your debt disintegrated more dignity than Comet A1 MAPS. And it survives.
This is 'offering Joe Rogan a guest spot' money. He'll probably take it.
You could bankroll Spencer Pratt for LA mayor. Rogan already endorsed.
Your debt has its own MetLife Stadium residency. BTS opens for you.
You owe more than ICE paid Todd Lyons to quietly exit on May 31.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a Utopia Planitia ash fleck. Petty but yours.
Smaller than the sungrazer comet before it died. And somehow less dignified.
Bring it up with the solemnity of a FIFA tailgating press release.
That's two BTS light sticks. You pick the color. They handle the apology.
They owe you a Spencer Pratt endorsement. Joe Rogan personally ratifies.
Enough to cover Alshon Jeffery's filing fees. He's grateful. You're richer.
They owe you a Mars Express Orbiter wallpaper pack. Premium tier.
That's a tailgate's worth of snacks that aren't even allowed at the stadium.
This is 'they cook, you critique' money. Gordon Ramsay voice on.
They could fund a Pan-STARRS comet-watching weekend. You supply the couch.
A Joe Rogan mid-roll sponsor slot. They buy it. You take the royalties.
Equivalent to one Todd Lyons farewell sheet cake. Catered. Iced.
They owe you a MetLife nosebleed for BTS. Or a suite, for their silence.
That's a small Iran radar system. For reasons. Don't ask.
You could name a Mars crater. 'The Debt' has a nice ring to it.
They owe you the Spencer Pratt mayoral platform. Title sponsor tier.
That's BTS's entire light-stick supply chain. You control the lasers now.
You're owed more than China quoted Iran for advanced radar arrays.
